title: Bridge Essay: Brain evolution and the meaning of catatonia - An update.
concept: Intersubjectivity — second-person neuroscience, embodied empathy, shared intentionality, social predictive processing.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Social Incarnation** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Intersubjectivity — second-person neuroscience, embodied empathy, shared intentionality, social predictive processing.

**Brain evolution and the meaning of catatonia - An update.** - Schizophr Res (2024). DOI: 10.1016/j.schres.2023.01.026. PMID: 36754715. Back in 2004, in a chapter titled "Brain Evolution and the Meaning of Catatonia", a case was made that the syndrome's core meaning is embedded in millions of years of vertebrate brain evolution. (Fricchione, 2004) In this update, advances over the last almost 20 years, in catatonia theory and research in particular, and pertinent neuropsychiatry in general, will be applied to this question of meaning. The approach will rely heavily on a number of thought leaders, including Nicos Tinbergen, Paul
